title: Drop Point Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife 4.75 Inch with Window Punch, Camo Styles
description:
Be prepared for any situation with the ASR Outdoor Drop Point Pocket Knife! This pocket knife features a spring assisted drop point blade constructed of durable 440 stainless steel. The handle has a comfortable ergonomic grip to prevent slippage, and features a cool Reptile skin design. This knife also comes with a window punch and seat belt cutter as an added safety measure. The metal pocket clip will allow you to easily secure the blade while not in use. This is a great every day use tool or gift idea for knife collectors and fanatics!
